title: Writing - Part 1: Learning Languages
description: Your class has been discussing whether learning a foreign language should be compulsory in schools and what benefits it brings.

content.question: Write an essay discussing two of the benefits in your notes. You should explain which benefit you think is most valuable, giving reasons for your opinion.

opinions: Speaking more than one language opens doors in the international job market.
Learning a language helps people appreciate different cultures and broaden their worldview.
Bilingual people develop better problem-solving and multitasking skills.

structure.intro: Introduce the value of learning foreign languages and state the two benefits you will discuss.
structure.body1: Discuss the first benefit with supporting examples or evidence.
structure.body2: Discuss the second benefit and compare its value to the first.
structure.conclusion: Summarise your argument and state which benefit you find most significant.

content.modelAnswer:
In an increasingly interconnected world, the ability to speak more than one language is a valuable asset. Among the many benefits of language learning, two stand out: improved career prospects and greater cultural understanding.

In the modern job market, multilingual candidates are highly sought after. Companies operating internationally need employees who can communicate with clients and partners from different countries. A second language can therefore make a significant difference when applying for jobs, as well as opening up opportunities for working abroad.

Beyond professional advantages, learning a foreign language fosters a deeper appreciation of different cultures. When students engage with a language, they also encounter the literature, history and traditions of its speakers. This exposure builds empathy and helps break down stereotypes, contributing to a more tolerant and open-minded society.

In my view, cultural understanding is the most valuable benefit. Although career advantages are undeniably important, the ability to connect with people across cultural boundaries has a wider positive impact on society as a whole. A world in which people make the effort to understand one another is ultimately more harmonious and peaceful.
